### Current Test Gap
Identify the component lacking coverage (e.g., `Routes/search` endpoints or React components).

### Proposed Test Strategy
- [ ] Unit Tests (Pytest / Jest)
- [ ] Integration Tests (API + Qdrant)
- [ ] End-to-End Tests (Cypress/Playwright)

### Expected outcome
Describe how these tests will improve the robustness of the project.
